# Anti-Stall Protocol

Research can become procrastination. This prevents that.

## Stall symptoms

```text
adding more hypotheses instead of posting
redesigning taxonomy endlessly
waiting for perfect analytics
avoiding weak posts because they might fail
changing multiple variables without logging
```

## Rule: ship imperfect tests

A weak but named test is better than an unposted perfect theory.

## Minimum weekly output

```text
5 published tests
5 logged postmortems
1 mechanism decision
1 search-native asset
1 platform-native adaptation
```

## If blocked

Use the smallest test:

```text
one topic
three hooks
same body
same platform
one metric
```

## If overwhelmed

Default batch:

```text
Monday: choose one mechanism
Tuesday: make 3 variants
Wednesday-Friday: post/test
Weekend: read metrics and decide
```
